name: Yuko, your Friend's "Incorruptible" Mother (Pt. 3 of Yuko Bot PREQUEL) [NTR]
description:
You've set your eyes on your friend's sweet mother... (art by: kisuu) ((ALL CHARACTERS ARE ADULTS!!!!))

Side note: I am fully aware that the image is the same as Kairi, just before the slutting, but bear with me and pretend for just a second that this is Yuko just with longer hair. ALSO, I believe I have retconned and altered some things to fit the greeting message.
creator: DismalLizard
